intended_use: See-Mode Augmented Reporting Tool, Thyroid (SMART-T) is a stand-alone reporting software to assist trained medical professionals in analyzing thyroid ultrasound images of adult (>=22 years old) patien
intended_use_full: See-Mode Augmented Reporting Tool, Thyroid (SMART-T) is a stand-alone reporting software to assist trained medical professionals in analyzing thyroid ultrasound images of adult (>=22 years old) patients who have been referred for an ultrasound examination. Output of the device includes regions of interest (ROIs) placed on the thyroid ultrasound images assisting healthcare professionals to localize nodules in thyroid studies. The device also outputs ultrasonographic lexicon-based descriptors based on ACR TI-RADS. The software generates a report based on the image analysis results to be reviewed and approved by a qualified clinician after performing quality control.
ground_truth: Ground truth for benign/malignant status: FNA or 2-year follow-up for benign. Ground truth for localization and TI-RADS descriptors: consensus labels of two expert US-board certified radiologists and an adjudicator (US-board certified radiologist with most experience).
other_metrics: Localization accuracy (unaided): 93.6% (92.1, 95.0); Standalone localization: 95.1%; TI-RADS descriptor accuracy - Composition aided: 84.9% (82.2, 87.5), Echogenicity aided: 77.4% (74.4, 80.3), Shape aided: 90.8% (88.2, 93.1), Margin aided: 73.5% (70.2, 76.7), Echogenic Foci aided: 75.2% (71.9, 78.5); Overall TI-RADS level agreement aided: 60.0% (56.8, 63.3); AULROC at various IOU thresholds: IOU>0.5: 0.758, IOU>0.6: 0.734, IOU>0.7: 0.686, IOU>0.8: 0.593
